name: control mapping satisfied_by entries are restricted to the three-value enum rubric_rule, hook, or artifact and any other value is rejected
command:
mkdir -p compliance && printf '- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [external_audit]
  legal_review_status: not-applicable
' > compliance/controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-control-mapping.sh" --controls compliance/controls.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'satisfied_by' err.txt && grep -q 'external_audit' err.txt && grep -q 'rubric_rule|hook|artifact' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
